description: Fragment of a draft letter in the name of the community of Fustat regarding the imposition of an excommunication a certain Avraham, ca. 1035. Gil suggests that this Avraham might be Avraham b. David Ibn Sughmār and that this is dealing with the same scandal as in T-S Ar.54.93 (PGPID 1277).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
